message.content:
@startuml
title Remove Bag Effect

participant Virologist
participant Bag

Virologist -> Bag : **1** removeEffect(virologist)
activate Bag

Bag -> Bag : **2** getExtraInventorSize()
activate Bag
Bag --> Bag : **3** extraInventorSize
deactivate Bag

Bag -> Virologist : **4** getInventorSize()
activate Virologist
Virologist --> Bag : **5** inventorSize
deactivate Virologist

note over Virologist, Bag #FFFFCC : **Decreas** the inventor size by the **bag's extra inventor size**

Bag -> Virologist : **6** setInventorySize(inventorSize - extraInventorSize)
activate Virologist
Virologist --> Bag : **7**
deactivate Virologist

deactivate Bag
Bag --> Virologist : **8**

@enduml
